name: space collector reads friction tracker events as a Flow-and-Efficiency signal source
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && for i in 1 2 3; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-block --hook lock-acquire --decision deny --at 2026-05-13T00:00:0${i}Z 2>/dev/null; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric friction-events --since 1d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dimension=efficiency_and_flow' out.txt && grep -q 'friction_events=3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
